allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -c "import google.genai, dotenv; print\('Imports werken!'\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -c "import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; from google import genai; load_dotenv\(\); c=genai.Client\(api_key=os.getenv\('GEMINI_API_KEY'\)\); print\(c.models.generate_content\(model='gemini-2.5-flash', contents='Zeg in 1 zin hallo in het Nederlands.'\).text\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -c "import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; from google import genai; from google.genai import types; load_dotenv\(\); c=genai.Client\(api_key=os.getenv\('GEMINI_API_KEY'\)\); chat=c.chats.create\(model='gemini-2.5-flash', config=types.GenerateContentConfig\(system_instruction='Antwoord kort in het Nederlands.'\)\); print\('1:', chat.send_message\('Mijn naam is Sam.'\).text\); print\('2:', chat.send_message\('Wat is mijn naam?'\).text\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -m py_compile website.py; if \($?\) { "website.py is foutloos!" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -m py_compile vluchten.py; if \($?\) { "vluchten.py is foutloos!" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -c "import datetime, urllib.parse; v='AMS'; b='AYT'; h=datetime.date\(2026,7,1\); t=datetime.date\(2026,7,8\); p=2; sky='https://www.skyscanner.nl/transport/vluchten/'+v.lower\(\)+'/'+b.lower\(\)+'/'+h.strftime\('%y%m%d'\)+'/'+t.strftime\('%y%m%d'\)+'/?adults='+str\(p\); zin='Flights from '+v+' to '+b+' on '+h.isoformat\(\)+' returning '+t.isoformat\(\); g='https://www.google.com/travel/flights?q='+urllib.parse.quote\(zin\); print\('Skyscanner:', sky\); print\('Google:', g\)")

PowerShell($verbinding = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 8501 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; if \($verbinding.TcpTestSucceeded\) { "Website draait op http://localhost:8501" } else { "Website draait NIET meer" })

PowerShell($v = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 8501 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; if \($v.TcpTestSucceeded\) { "Website draait nog op http://localhost:8501" } else { "Website draait niet meer" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); python -m py_compile vluchten.py; if \($?\) { "vluchten.py is foutloos!" }; $v = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 8501 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; if \($v.TcpTestSucceeded\) { "Website draait nog." } else { "Website draait niet." })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Write-Output "--- git ---"; try { git --version } catch { "git niet gevonden" }; Write-Output "--- gh \(GitHub CLI\) ---"; try { gh --version } catch { "gh niet gevonden" })
